fixesApplied.description: Desktop tab button titles were 24px (text-header-5) but Figma specifies 40px. Changed to text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem] which gives 32px base and 40px (2.5rem) on desktop.
Mobile accordion titles were 20px (text-header-6) but Figma specifies 32px. Changed to text-header-3 which gives 32px base, matching Figma exactly.

files.note: Combined with DQA-001 fix in single edit

fixesApplied.description: Inactive tab buttons in PHP missing h-[140px] class, causing layout shift before JS initializes. Added h-[140px] to inactive buttons (index !== 0) and bg-accent selected to active button (index === 0) in the class_name array.
fixesApplied.note: JS selectTab() continues to toggle h-[140px] and bg-accent/selected dynamically. Initial render now matches the post-JS state.

fixesApplied.description: Converted CRLF line endings to LF in Tabs.tsx
Converted CRLF line endings to LF in TabsItem.tsx

warnings: CSS parser warnings for custom gap variables (pre-existing)
Asset size limit warnings for editor.js and screen entrypoints (pre-existing)

notes: TSX desktop tab title: font-heading text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem] flex-1
PHP desktop tab title: font-heading text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem] w-full
PHP mobile tab title: font-heading text-header-3 flex-1
TSX uses md:h-[140px] (single responsive DOM); PHP uses h-[140px] (desktop-only DOM section) -- architecturally equivalent
TSX bg-accent toggled by currentTab state; PHP bg-accent applied to index === 0 (first tab active by default)

typographyMapping.desktop40px: text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem] -- text-header-3 provides 32px base; md:text-[2.5rem] overrides font-size to 40px on desktop. No existing header token maps to exactly 40px on desktop (text-header-3 = 30px at md, text-header-2 = 60px at md).
typographyMapping.mobile32px: text-header-3 -- resolves to 2rem (32px) at base, matching Figma's 32px mobile value exactly.
